emails.subject: SoCal Storage?
emails.body: SoCal Storage? Hey Matt, Wassup? How are things in Portland? Do you think you might be able to provide me with the Socal injection number for yesterday from there? Thanks! I really appreciate it! Sheila

emails.subject: RE: SoCal Storage?
emails.body: RE: SoCal Storage? socal injected 101,000 yesterday. let me know if you need anything else. To: Smith, Matt

emails.subject: RE: SoCal Storage?
emails.body: Thanks a bunch, Matt! Have a great weekend! s. To: Chang, Sheila
